 {"id":"bd-tbz3","title":"bd init UX Improvements","description":"bd init leaves users with incomplete setup, requiring manual bd doctor --fix. Issues found: (1) git hooks not installed if user declines prompt, (2) no auto-migration when CLI is upgraded, (3) stale merge driver configs from old versions. Fix by making bd init more robust with better defaults and auto-migration.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-11-21T23:16:00.333543-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-21T23:16:37.811233-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-tggf","title":"Code Health Review Dec 2025: Technical Debt Cleanup","description":"Epic grouping technical debt identified in the Dec 16, 2025 code health review.

## Overall Health Grade: B (Solid foundation, needs cleanup)

### P1 (High Priority):
- bd-74w1: Consolidate duplicate path-finding utilities
- bd-b6xo: Remove/fix ClearDirtyIssues() race condition
- bd-b3og: Fix TestImportBugIntegration deadlock

### P2 (Medium Priority):
- bd-05a8: Split large files (doctor.go, sync.go)
- bd-qioh: Standardize error handling patterns
- bd-rgyd: Split queries.go (1586 lines)
- bd-9g1z: Fix/remove TestFindJSONLPathDefault

### P3 (Low Priority):
- bd-ork0: Add comments to 30+ ignored errors
- bd-4nqq: Remove dead test code in info_test.go
- bd-dhza: Reduce global state in main.go

## Key Areas:
1. Code duplication in path utilities
2. Large monolithic files (5 files >1000 lines)
3. Global state (25+ variables, 3 deprecated)
4. Silent error suppression (30+ instances)
5. Test gaps and dead test code
6. Atomicity risks in batch operations","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-16T18:18:58.115507-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-16T18:21:50.561709-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-thgk","title":"Improve test coverage for internal/compact (18.2% → 70%)","description":"The compact package has only 18.2% test coverage. This is a core package handling issue compaction and should have at least 70% coverage.

Key functions needing tests:
- runCompactSingle (0%)
- runCompactAll (0%)
- runCompactRPC (0%)
- runCompactStatsRPC (0%)
- runCompactAnalyze (0%)
- runCompactApply (0%)
- pruneDeletionsManifest (0%)

Current coverage: 18.2%
Target coverage: 70%","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T20:42:58.455767-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T21:01:15.070551-08:00"}
-{"id":"bd-tm2p","title":"Polecats get stuck on interactive shell prompts (cp/mv/rm -i)","description":"During swarm operations, polecats frequently get stuck waiting for interactive prompts from shell commands like:
- cp prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'
- mv prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'  
- rm prompting 'remove file?'

This happens because macOS aliases or shell configs may have -i flags set by default.

Root cause: Claude Code runs commands that trigger interactive confirmation prompts, but cannot respond to them, causing the agent to hang indefinitely.

Observed in: Multiple polecats during GH issues swarm (Dec 2024)
- Derrick, Roustabout, Prospector, Warboy all got stuck on y/n prompts

Suggested fixes:
1. AGENTS.md should instruct agents to always use -f flag with cp/mv/rm
2. Polecat startup could set shell aliases to use non-interactive versions
3. bd prime hook could include guidance about non-interactive commands
4. Consider detecting stuck prompts and auto-recovering","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-14T16:51:24.572271-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-14T16:51:24.572271-08:00"}
+{"id":"bd-tm2p","title":"Polecats get stuck on interactive shell prompts (cp/mv/rm -i)","description":"During swarm operations, polecats frequently get stuck waiting for interactive prompts from shell commands like:
- cp prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'
- mv prompting 'overwrite file? (y/n)'  
- rm prompting 'remove file?'

This happens because macOS aliases or shell configs may have -i flags set by default.

Root cause: Claude Code runs commands that trigger interactive confirmation prompts, but cannot respond to them, causing the agent to hang indefinitely.

Observed in: Multiple polecats during GH issues swarm (Dec 2024)
- Derrick, Roustabout, Prospector, Warboy all got stuck on y/n prompts

Suggested fixes:
1. AGENTS.md should instruct agents to always use -f flag with cp/mv/rm
2. Polecat startup could set shell aliases to use non-interactive versions
3. bd prime hook could include guidance about non-interactive commands
4. Consider detecting stuck prompts and auto-recovering","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-14T16:51:24.572271-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T19:13:04.074424-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T19:13:04.074424-08:00","close_reason":"Not a beads core issue - this is an agent workflow issue for Claude Code/polecats. Moved to documentation guidance in AGENTS.md."}
